title: Website Configuration
subtitle: Manage global site settings, branding, social links, payments, policy documents, and SEO parameters.

general.title: Support Contact Information
general.subtitle: Provide active contact detail parameters displayed in web footer and header layouts.
general.hotline_help: E.g., 1900 1800 or 09xx xxx xxx (conforms to Vietnamese formats).
general.email_help: Email address for general user inquiries and business proposals.
general.address_help: Physical location address of head office.

brand.title: Brand Assets & Visual Identity
brand.subtitle: Upload logo and favicon resources defining browser look and feel.
brand.logo_help: Upload logo image displayed in main menus.
brand.favicon_help: Upload high resolution icon displayed in browser tabs.

social.title: Social Networking Channels
social.subtitle: Add links to social networking channels displayed in footer sections.

payment.title: Integrated Payment Gateways
payment.subtitle: Enable or disable individual payment processors instantly across booking flows.
payment.sepay_help: Automatic bank transfer QR gateway through SePay (Recommended).
payment.cod_help: Manual verification / local bank transfer method.
payment.vnpay_help: VNPay domestic card and banking gateway (Reserved).
payment.momo_help: Direct checkout via MoMo e-wallet app (Reserved).

policy.title: Policy & Legal Regulations Links
policy.subtitle: Define landing paths for privacy and terms regulations.

seo.title: Global Search Engine Optimization
seo.subtitle: Standard default meta attributes loaded dynamically when specific pages lack unique SEO values.
seo.og_image_help: Default image attached when sharing website link on social media.

validation.hotline_invalid: Invalid hotline or Vietnamese phone format.
validation.payment_required: At least one payment gateway must be enabled.
validation.meta_title_min: Meta title must be at least 10 characters.
validation.meta_description_min: Meta description must be at least 20 characters.

hints.chatbot_managed_elsewhere: AI Chatbot settings are managed separately on the
hints.payment_reserved: Reserved gateway — not yet enabled in production.

actions.load_failed_desc: Configuration data is temporarily unavailable. Please try loading again.
actions.unsaved_desc: You have unsaved changes in website settings configuration. Are you sure you want to discard them?
